chunks.text: Chamath and Friedberg describe their adventures in DC and welcome Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent!
Scott's background, what drew him to equities, the role of macro investors
The legendary trade that broke the Bank of England in 1992, and how it relates to Main Street vs Wall Street today
Scott explains the Trump Administration's economic strategy
How this administration plans to de-regulate the economy, Fed relationship, re-financing debt
DOGE, DC grifts, shakeup at the IRS
Re-engineering social security through the US SWF, how energy factors in
Surprises, fixing affordability, thoughts on President Trump
